heading: Personnel management authorities for positions involved in the development and implementation of the interoperable electronic data system (“Chimera system”)
label: 1724 Personnel management authorities for positions involved in the development and implementation of the interoperable electronic data system (“Chimera system”)
notes: References in TextLevel III of the Executive Schedule, referred to in subsec. (b), is set out in , Government Organization and Employees.section 5314 of Title 5

Change of NameCommittee on International Relations of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Foreign Affairs of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 6, One Hundred Tenth Congress, .Jan. 5, 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law relating to position classification or employee pay or performance, the Attorney General may hire and fix the compensation of necessary scientific, technical, engineering, and other analytical personnel for the purpose of the development and implementation of the interoperable electronic data system described in (also known as the “Chimera system”).section 1722(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on rate of pay
children.label: b Limitation on rate of pay
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by law, no employee compensated under subsection (a) may be paid at a rate in excess of the rate payable for a position at level III of the Executive Schedule.

children.heading: Limitation on total calendar year payments
children.label: c Limitation on total calendar year payments
children.text: Total payments to employees under any system established under this section shall be subject to the limitation on payments to employees under .section 5307 of title 5
describing the Attorney General’s intended use of the authority under this section; and
identifying any provisions of title 5 being waived for purposes of the development and implementation of the Chimera system.

children.heading: Termination date
children.label: e Termination date
children.text: The authority of this section shall terminate upon the implementation of the Chimera system.
